name: Chaos Knight
description: The light shall be blackened, and chaos shall reign.

abilities.name: Fundamental Forging
abilities.description: Grants an additional random enchantment that does not provide negative stats whenever crafting a neutral item.

abilities.name: Chaos Bolt
abilities.description: Creates a weaker Phantasm-based illusion to attack the affected enemy unit upon the first projectile impact. Creates a -based illusion corresponding of 's ability level, with the ability being hidden.

abilities.name: Reality Rift
abilities.description: Teleports Chaos Knight and all illusions he has and the targeted unit to a point along the line between both of them. Applies armor reduction to the affected enemy unit. is innately immune to the offensive teleport component. However, other ability effects still apply.

abilities.name: Chaos Strike
abilities.description: Chaos Knight and his illusions' attacks have a chance to deal a critical strike of varying strength, in addition to a lifesteal for the percentage of the damage.

abilities.name: Phantasm
abilities.description: Globally creates an illusion of each allied heroes upon cast. Passively has a chance to create an additional illusion per illusion-creating source.
